uplink.description: TTN example 1: both sensors flagged (solar radiation + battery)
uplink._note: expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle): raw 0x8069=32873 -> 3*(32873/32768-1)*1000*5 = 48.065... W/m², rounded to 2 dp; battery 0x0C60=3168 mV -> 3.168 V.

uplink.description: TTN example 2: battery only (solar radiation flag clear)
uplink._note: flags=0x0002 -> only bit1 (battery) set; matches upstream oracle (no total_solar_radiation key).

uplink.description: Synthetic: solar radiation only, mid-scale count
uplink._note: flags=0x0001 -> only solar radiation; raw 0xA000=40960 -> 3*(40960/32768-1)*1000*5 = 3750 W/m² (matches upstream oracle exactly).
version byte 1 != 2; mirrors upstream guard which returns an error string.
